examples: He had short trousers and scabby knees.
Black birds flew over, said a black spots like people scabby shadow.
The Welsh Captain describes Pistol as a "rascally, scald [scabby], beggarly, lousy, pragging [show-off] knave"in Henry 5.
Her one-year-old child's face is scarred and scabby with ringworm.
